data.title: SUI Lianchuang: The $160 million stolen from Cetus has been frozen and will be returned to the pool soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News SUI Lianchuang Adeniyi.sui said that of the $220 million stolen from Cetus, $160 million has been frozen and will be returned to the Cetus pool soon. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Linea Product Manager: LINEA Token Economics Enters Final Legal Review Stage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Linea Product Manager Declan Fox posted on the X platform, "Linea's decentralization is progressing smoothly, and the token economy and governance proposals have entered the final legal review. In terms of products, Beta v2 will be launched on the mainnet next month, bringing important performance upgrades. There are also plans for Limitless Prover and Pectra hard forks in the future. Ecosystem construction is accelerating, and the newly launched Linea Hub facilitates developer access and supports large-scale project integration. Token-related information will only be released through official channels, so please be wary of scams."

data.title: Binance will launch B perpetual contract, supporting 50x leverage
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch the B/USDT perpetual contract at 16:30 (UTC) on May 22, 2025, supporting up to 50x leverage. The contract will be settled based on USDT and adopt a multi-asset model, allowing users to trade with a variety of margin assets. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Billionaire Ray Dalio Says Fed Shouldn’t Cut Rates Yet, Warns Against Aggressive Easing of Monetary Policy for Bond Market
data.description:
Billionaire investor and founder of hedge fund Bridgewater Associates, Ray Dalio, thinks it is not yet time for the Federal Reserve to ease the US monetary policy. In a new Bloomberg interview, Dalio says the Fed “should not cut interest rates” despite the pressure to do so.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/22/billionaire-ray-dalio-says-fed-shouldnt-cut-rates-yet-warns-against-aggressive-easing-of-monetary-policy-for-bond-market/

Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins fluctuates greatly, so investors are advised to participate with caution.

data.title: Ethereum OG whale sold 1,000 ETH again 2 hours ago, worth $2.65 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, "OG of ICO 100,000 $ETH in 2015" sold 1,000 ETH again 2 hours ago, worth $2.65 million, with a cost as low as $0.31.
He transferred 5,000 ETH to the new address 0x0bE...0ECDf, and the remaining 4,000 are expected to be sold in the near future; since April, the whale has sold a total of 7,000 ETH and made a profit of $12.65 million.

data.title: Synthetix Drops Derive Deal After Community Feedback Sparks Rethink
data.description:
TL;DR Synthetix canceled the Derive acquisition after pushback from both communities, who questioned the deal’s value and swap terms. The proposal involved swapping 27 DRV for each SNX with an initial lockup, plus a 170 million SNX token issuance that raised concerns. Derive, which had already severed ties with Synthetix’s infrastructure, will continue operating independently. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/synthetix-drops-derive-deal-after-community-feedback-sparks-rethink/

data.title: Details of the latest Aethir node repurchase plan revealed, eATH will be used as a voucher to participate in Aethir Season2&3 AirDrop
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Aethir recently announced the launch of the Checker node repurchase plan, allowing its node holders to sell their node licenses back to Aethir and obtain corresponding benefits. The repurchase plan will be officially launched on May 27, 25. Checker node holders can sell their node NFTs back to the Aethir Foundation through the official link and obtain the consideration eATH (EigenATH). The token has a 1-year lock-up period and a redemption period of June 13, 2026. Once the redemption process is entered, eATH will be released linearly on a 30-day basis and converted to ATH.
eATH will be used to support Aethir's decentralized cloud computing infrastructure. Through the repurchase, users hold equity in the form of eATH, which essentially supports the access of a new batch of GPU computing power. The repurchase price is not fixed and will fluctuate according to market conditions and the repurchase ratio. Early participants will receive additional rewards.

data.title: Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Bill Clears Texas Legislature
data.description:
Texas is poised to become the third U. S. state to establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve after the legislature passed SB 21 with bipartisan support.

The post Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Bill Clears Texas Legislature first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/05/22/texas-strategic-bitcoin-reserve-passes/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=texas-strategic-bitcoin-reserve-passes

data.title: Coinbase hacker sold 8,775 ETH for 23.23 million DAI in the past 2 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ember, in the past 2 hours, the hacker who stole funds from Coinbase users continued to sell 8,775 ETH in exchange for 23.23 million DAI.
Since 8 am this morning, the hacker who stole funds from Coinbase users has transferred a total of 26,347 ETH through THORChain, and then sold it for 68.18 million DAI, with an average selling price of US$2,588.

data.title: H100 Group becomes the first listed company in Sweden to establish Bitcoin reserves, has purchased 4.39 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News H100 Group announced that it has purchased 4.39 bitcoins, becoming the first publicly listed company in Sweden to establish a bitcoin reserve. (Bitcoin Magazine)

data.title: Standard Chartered analyst: BTC may reach $200,000 by the end of the year and $500,000 by 2028
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Geoffrey Kendrick, global head of digital asset research at Standard Chartered Bank, said that all predicted catalysts are consistent with the rise of the asset, and more positive momentum is expected in prices in the coming weeks and months, but caution is also recommended due to insufficient market liquidity. Geoffrey Kendrick added: "My prediction for Bitcoin is that the number of Bitcoins will reach 120,000 by the end of the second quarter, 200,000 by the end of 2025, and 500,000 by the end of 2028. Everything is under control." 
Analysts pointed out that the "Buy in May" strategy performs well in the current market. The price of Bitcoin broke through $111,000, setting a record high. In addition, the market demand for Bitcoin options has surged, showing investors' strong interest in future trends. Analysts believe that the current market sentiment is positive and capital inflows continue, which may drive Bitcoin prices further up. However, some experts also remind investors to pay attention to market volatility and potential risks. (The Block)

During the event, you can share exclusive token rewards by trading BANK, AGT, REX, PUFFER and FHE in Binance Wallet (without private key) or through Binance Alpha.
Event time: 00:00 on May 23, 2025 to 00:00 on June 6, 2025 (Eastern Time Zone 8).

data.title: Which senators invest in crypto? 11 lawmakers have blockchain-related investments
data.description:
As the question of stablecoin regulation heats up in the US Senate, so has the issue of which members are personally invested in cryptocurrencies and cryptocurrency firms. On May 19, the Senate voted to invoke cloture and move ahead with the GENIUS Act, which would provide a regulatory framework for stablecoins. The measure passed 66-32, with 16 Democrats supporting the bill. Democratic concerns over corruption and politicians’ ties to cryptocurrency firms made the bipartisan move controversial
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/senators-invest-crypto-blockchain-related-investments?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
